## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new data source adapter, new output format, etc.)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] CLI works (`python scripts/scraper.py --help`)
- [ ] URL router works (`python -c "from engine.router import URLRouter; print(URLRouter.route('...'))"`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have added a config YAML for new data sources (if applicable)
